description: Extract structured fields from purchase orders issued by buyers to suppliers

poNumber.description: Unique purchase order identifier found at the top under 'PO Number', 'PO No.', or 'Order Number'.

poDate.description: Date the purchase order was issued by the buyer, found under 'PO Date', 'Order Date', or 'Issue Date'.

buyerName.description: Name of the company or individual issuing the purchase order, found under 'Buyer', 'Ship From', or in the letterhead.

supplierName.description: Name of the vendor or supplier to whom the order is addressed, found under 'Vendor', 'Supplier', or 'Ship To'.

deliveryDate.description: Expected or requested delivery date for the ordered items, found under 'Delivery Date', 'Required By', or 'Expected Delivery'.

deliveryAddress.description: Full shipping or delivery address including street, city, state, and PIN/ZIP, found under 'Ship To', 'Delivery Address', or 'Consignee'.

totalAmount.description: Total value of the purchase order including taxes if applicable, found under 'PO Total', 'Grand Total', or 'Order Value'. Exclude currency symbols.

paymentTerms.description: Agreed payment conditions such as 'Net 30', '50% Advance', or 'Payment on Delivery', found under 'Payment Terms'.
